items.title: API server not public
items.description: Restrict kube-apiserver to private networks or authorized IPs.
items.how_to_find: Cluster audit (Cluster Configuration): Restrict kube-apiserver to private networks or authorized IPs. Run `kubectl auth can-i --list`, kube-bench, kube-hunter, and Trivy on images. Validate control: API server not public.
items.how_to_fix: Private API server, RBAC least privilege, Pod Security Standards, network policies default-deny, no privileged pods or docker.sock mounts, scan images in CI, sign images, encrypt secrets with CSI.
